name: Microsoft Power Platform (environment roles: Environment Admin / Maker)
status: structure built -- BAP admin API environment roleAssignments (flat model: principal group + role). Pairs with PIM-PowerPlatformDiscovery.ps1 (environment auto-detect -> proposed PIM groups). Live-validation pending a Power Platform tenant where the engine SPN is a Power Platform admin + the BAP roleAssignments role-name/path confirmed against a live environment. In-app Dataverse SECURITY ROLES (a different surface) are covered by the separate 'dataverse' connector; this one is the ENVIRONMENT-level admin/maker grant.
permissionsNeeded: Power Platform: the engine SPN registered as a Power Platform administrator (or Dynamics 365 admin); 'Allow service principals' / tenant-isolation settings must permit SP role management; resource audience https://service.powerapps.com/

prerequisites.perRowResource: Each row's Resource column = the Power Platform ENVIRONMENT name (the immutable id from discovery, e.g. 'Default-<tenantGuid>' or a 'xxxxxxxx-...' id). baseUrl/paths are token-expanded with it so one connector covers every environment.
prerequisites.tokenAdapter: auth=powerplatform -> token for https://service.powerapps.com/ supplied via $global:PIM_WorkloadTokens['powerplatform'] (launcher-minted) or Get-AzAccessToken with that resource. (The discovery LISTING uses the BAP admin audience https://api.bap.microsoft.com.)
prerequisites.rolesAreEnvironmentRoles: Power Platform environment roles are a fixed set (Environment Admin, Environment Maker) -- declared as a static roles array (no per-environment list API for the environment-level roles).
prerequisites.discoveryCompanion: New environments are surfaced by PIM-PowerPlatformDiscovery.ps1 (propose-don't-auto-map); once a PIM group exists for the environment, a PIM-Assignments-Workloads row binds it here.

roles.name: Environment Admin
roles.description: Full administrative control of the environment

roles.name: Environment Maker
roles.description: Create apps / flows / connections in the environment
